name: Chicken Macaroni Stew
recipeInstructions:
- Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until tender.
- In a saucepan, break up large pieces of tomatoes and combine all ingredients except chicken.
- Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer gently, uncovered, for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
- Add cooked chicken and heat through.
- Remove bay leaf before serving.
This recipe serves 2 servings, each approximately 1-1/4 cups, with a calorie count of 286 per serving.
